Sources.Title: James W. Clement — participant-uploaded 2017 Labcorp/Life Extension blood tests
Personal Genome Project — James W. Clement public profile hu82E689

TranscriptionNotes: The Personal Genome Project profile explicitly identifies James W. Clement and labels the 2017 blood-test PDF as participant-supplied data.
The report identifies James W. Clement and assigns the complete blood count, chemistry panel, and cardiac CRP to one Labcorp order collected on 11 April 2017 at 10:15 AM EST.

AgeYears was calculated from the date of birth and collection date shown in the voluntarily public report, rounded to two decimals; the date of birth is not republished here. The report also states age 61.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
